future_status_protocol: If San Antonio publishes a per-field rainout/status page or hotline extension for Lady Bird Johnson Park, update this official source and enable polling only after parser tests.
agent_rule: Official source wins. This city parks page confirms the public parks authority but is not a live rainout feed, so keep official status unknown unless a clear official closure/cancellation source is found. Tell the user to call 210-207-6000 or check the official source before leaving.
